reviews.review_description: This game is so close to perfect but few things, number one all I get is foul ball, foul ball, “that ball is way way back that is… foul” Also for home runs add a movement you could do like throw the bat or run the bases! Not a bad game, has potential. Great job
Maybe I’m missing something, but I don’t have enough room to grab the bat out of the locker to even play.  I tried seeing if I could move with the controller, but to no avail.  Disappointed.

developer_response.body: Hello Michael, thanks for your feedback. You can teleport in locker room environment using right controller grab button. We will work on usability and will improve this in near update.

reviews.review_description: This game is really fun to play highly recommend and really is fun and helps you swing level:)
Always says foul and the ball just goes backwards when you hit it and all you hear is just a foul it so annoying

it’s pretty good but i’ve playing this game for about 6 months and there has not been one single update to it like adjusting the position of your bat and this does help you on your swing a little bit but since then I have purchased Win reality and it’s is much much better.
It’s cool, but definitely needs work. Pitches too high are my main concern..

reviews.review_title: I mean it's good for a app lab game
reviews.review_description:
It's fine with me 
It's okay for an app lab game
But there is a lot of problems but it's fun

reviews.review_title: Major potential, just not there yet
reviews.review_description:
This game is super fun, even though it lacks a lot of content I’ve been hooked on this game. The mechanics of this game are excellent it just needs more content/things to do. 
Here are my suggestions:

Add more players on field (outfielders and in dugout)

Add a game mode where you basically play a full 9 inning game (don’t have to include defense just yet)

Let us customize bat 

Different pitches (curve ball, slider, change up) 

Different stadiums

Let us decide when the pitcher throws the next pitch (I need a break sometimes lol)
Can’t even hit the ball. What’s the point of the game?

Really Happy when I saw a new Baseball Game Here. Basically two other products: Totally Baseball (meh graphics) and This super expensive 30$\month app i dont remember the Name.

Too Bad oculus tracking is bad behind head/shoulders/Back. Makes it more a tennis simulator unfortunately. Fielding/pitching would be cool updates, more pitch styles so instead of batting practice it will be more a pitch guess practice (heater, breaking Ball, Strike or Ball incoming).

I Hope there is more to come!

developer_response.body: Thanks for leaving the comment! We are glad you liked Big Bat VR. We will definitely add pitching ability pretty soon and fielding is now on our make list, so thanks again for suggestions and stay tuned :)

reviews.review_description: This game made me break my controllers and I can’t even hit the ball good this game is 🍑

reviews.review_title: Not the best if u hit with ur left hand
reviews.review_description: U can only hit as a right handed batter, and I’m a left handed person, but if they fixed this bit would be 5 stars 100%

developer_response.body:
Hello, Thanks for the suggestion. We have implemented the ability to switch bat position between hands, so you can check it out!
Much thanks for appreciating our game <3

Can anyone tell me on a way I can try to get it to install?
We need multiplayer, running to bases, defense, teams, and more

It’s so hard to bat and that is not 40 mph and u try to hit it doesn’t hit even if I swinging nonstop it still won’t hit not realistic u can barley grab the bat
I love this but add a setting to mute announcer
hits literally dont register even at 40 mph
